text:
This Is Hell!
| A government against itself: The state of radical democracy in Venezuela.
A government against itself: The state of radical democracy in Venezuela.
Chavez gives this speech in late  where he's berating his government ministers - it's his last major speech - and part of what he's trying to do is lay out his legacy, and to make it clear what he stands for.
And in that speech it becomes perfectly clear he stands for the commune, and the development of an alternative form of production and radical democracy that stands against the existing state.
Political theorist George Ciccariello-Maher explores the political and economic history of the Venezuelan commune, from its pre-Chavez roots in a popular uprising against the neoliberal order, to the challenges of sustaining direct democracy and socialist principles in the face of vast demographic changes, oil market fluctuations and capitalist resistance.
George Ciccariello-Maher is an author and Associate Professor of Politics and Global Studies at Drexel University in Philadelphia.

SECURITY MANAGEMENT software and door control hardware are your business's first line of defense when it comes to loss prevention.
Starr Telecom offers the Infinias access control system, which makes access control easy.
Simply install one controller locally at each door and connect it to the nearest Power over Ethernet switch with a single Cat-/ cable.
Add doors anywhere your network goes, making it easy and cost effective to build a system one door at a time.
Combine the door controller with our access management software to create a highly scalable solution that can be deployed within one building, or across multiple locations around the world.

Major life transitions can be stressful, scary, or devastating.
Have you experienced one of these major life transitions?
These life transitions are the difficult realities of life - change is inevitable and major changes like these rock our world, emotionally and psychologically.
We work hard to achieve success, stability, and security.
Just when we think we've arrived, that things are going well and we have some balance in life, a major life transition can result in emotional turmoil and mental confusion.
Life transitions can be very challenging, and they're often an opportunity for personal growth and development.
Change and major life transitions are inevitable.
Our counseling and therapy staff specialize in supporting and guiding people through these difficult and challenging experiences.

Analysis from the TUC has found zero-hour workers do double the night shifts and are paid on average £ an hour less than other workers.
Trade Unions are campaigning on the issue throughout 'HeartUnions' week.
Union leaders will commit to negotiate an end to zero-hour contracts in workplaces where they have recognition.
An online petition has also been launched in an effort to build public support for a ban.
The most recent official figures show that across East Midlands, there are  people whose main job is a zero-hour contract.
Despite that, a TUC poll found that that two-thirds of zero-hour workers prefer to be on permanent, secure contracts.

We are a family run business able to undertake most building and renovation work in Powys, Herefordshire and Worcestershire.
We handle refurbishments and repairs from minor household building repairs, renewing kitchens, bathrooms, installing or upgrading heating systems, roof repairs and general building maintenance.
Our plumbers, electricians and gas engineers are fully qualified and able to work on smaller projects, complete upgrades or new installations.
We can repair both pitched and flat roofs, from a minor repair to a complete rebuild, and of course we can build new roofs onto new properties, extensions or conversions.
Have a look through our website to get an idea of our expertise and browse through the Project Gallery to see some of the projects we have recently worked on.
Feel free to get in touch either through the contact page of this website, by email at or by phone or to request building work or for an obligation free estimate.

Are you looking for a Face Painter for birthday parties in London?
Or perhaps you're holding a corporate event or school celebration with face painting?
Whatever your party requirements, we can provide the entertainment you need.
Our Face Painters are all set for children's party events, big and small!
Face Painting is a delightful way to create special memories at your kids party.
Imagination comes to life as children see themselves transformed into their favourite animal, character, and dazzling designs are created on smiling faces.
The best moment is when they see their painted faces for the first time in the mirror - they beam with big smiles and delight!

DNALC Executive Director Dave Micklos spent a week in NOvember  introducing teachers from the Philippine Science High School System to methods for lab instruction in molecular genetics and genomics.
The workshop was held in the new science lab on the Eastern Vismayas Campus developed as part of the  Breakthrough Junior Challenge award for Popular Vote winner, Hillary Diane Andales.
Dave took the educators on a field trip to conduct a mini ecological study using DNA barcoding to identify plants, animals, and fungi from the local habitat.
Learn more about the DNA Learning Center's involvement with the Breakthrough Junior Challenge.

Cruel, heartbreaking, exhausting and so rewarding it's addictive...Bikepacking.
This is a great self-filmed video from Montanus of their Iceland traverse.
Be careful, it might just inspire you to get out and punish yourself with an epic bikepacking trip.
I know it's got me planning one for as soon as possible.
Iceland Divide is a short film that chronicles a self-supported bikepacking expedition from north to south of Iceland, through one of the most extreme environments on the planet, following the only visible stretch of the longest mountain range on Earth, the Mid-Atlantic Ridge.
Lava ash, the boundless glaciers and the otherworldly landscapes accompany the Italian duo into a world of immeasurable desolation and enthralling beauty.
Inspired for an Iceland holiday?
Self-filmed and edited by Giorgio Frattale and Francesco D'Alessio.

Contact us to schedule a consultation about your security needs..

Research conducted by the Enterprise Strategy Group for cloud backup and recovery vendor Asigra Inc. has found that has a company's revenues increase, so does the pressure on IT to reduce costs.
Based on responses from nearly  financial and IT decision makers/influencers about the financial pressure they face to reduce IT costs as data continues to grow, the report found that two out of three felt pressure to reduce IT spending.
That's unsurprising, but what's interesting is that the pressure tended to increase along with a company's annual revenue, with respondents from larger companies more likely to report cost-cutting pressure than those from smaller firms.
In other findings, three out of four said they expect their data volumes to grow at  per cent or less annually, companies with less data (defined as less than TB) have lower cost estimates and are less likely to track the recovery of data, and  per cent of respondents said they'd prefer a backup and recovery software license model which charged for backup and recovery separately, rather than on capacity.
